name: ●○ ||{Razzle & Dazzle}||○● —●Project V.E.E.R.L.I.S
description:
"Don't ask about his attitude.."

🎭➕️☆★○●★☆➕️🎭

Well, I admit that originally the characters of this bot mini-series of this au were originally going to be 4. And it would end completely there.

But I decided to add a couple of extra characters (this time as toons and not twisted ones!) and as you can see, this group of brothers is one of them.

And one last thing, it's probably Dazzle who has the most control of the body and is doing most of the talking. Also, Razzle and Dazzle have different personalities, call them the "masks of stupidity and serenity."

Keep that in mind.

By the way, this is a little au created by me where everything changes abruptly. This is more for the new ones who don't know it.

🎭💠➕️🎭

Although, there is a little news, if you pay close attention to what I said, this mini-series is about to end. At least the first part.

So don't worry, there will probably be more in the near future (hopefully not too long). I'll just take maybe a few hours to plan the next characters.

For which I already have a little backstory created. And hopefully I'll also try to improve on my writing of the introduction (which is pretty awful as you can see in the previous ones.)

Also, if you still have any doubts about it, yes, there will be a second extra character before Veerlis, who will be the last character of this mini-series of this au in the first part.

🎭💠➕️🎭

And yes, this time I fell short of labels...

"Micheal, don't leave me here.. micheal.. MICHEAL, HELP M-"

I also wanted to apologize for the delay, but I was really hesitating whether to do this one or the one I had originally planned. Anyway, enjoy!
